examples.text: أَأَنْتُمْ أَنْشَأْتُمْ شَجَرَتَهَا أَمْ نَحْنُ الْمُنْشِئُونَ
examples.english: Is it you who produced its tree, or are We the producer?

senses.gloss: active participle of أَنْشَأَ (ʔanšaʔa), someone or something of performance as denoted by this verb

etymology.text: Derived from the active participle of أَنْشَأَ (ʔanšaʔa).
